name: Disney Illusion Island Starring Mickey and Friends
short_description: Mickey and Friends embark on an adventure to find three magical books and save the mysterious island of Monoth. Explore weird and wonderful biomes, meet unusual allies and face peculiar foes all in this hand-drawn 2D adventure.
detailed_description:
Reveal the Mysteries of Monoth

Mickey, Minnie, Donald, and Goofy must travel to each of the three biomes of Monoth to recover three stolen Tomes that protect the island. What secrets will they discover along the way?

Disney Illusion Island is a hand-drawn 2D adventure, for the whole family. Set across a seamless interconnected world, players will explore all that Monoth has to offer, from the highest mountains to the deepest roots of the lands. Unlocking abilities, solving puzzles and meeting weird and wonderful characters along the way.

Disney Illusion Island Expanded with Free Content

Keeper Up - Scramble to grab collectibles through remixed areas of Monoth, making your way to the finish line in the best time possible in a new time trial mode!

Mystery In Monoth - Curious clues are popping up across Monoth, and Dash Dolphin needs your help to find them. Locate clues, close cases, and solve this brand-new detective mystery.

Cave Adventuring Scavenger Hunt (C.A.S.H.) - Go on the hunt with the help of Scrooge and the brand-new ability – Dig! C.A.S.H. in for permanent upgrades to help you explore in Cave Adventuring Scavenger Hunt.

Game Features

  • Classic-inspired side-scrolling action, with modern twists.
  • Fun for the whole family, with a range of accessibility options.
  • Play as Mickey Mouse, Minnie Mouse, Donald Duck or Goofy, and enjoy each character’s bright and unique personality.
  • Unlock a range of new items and abilities, including swinging, swimming, gliding and more.
  • Embark on a solo mission to save Monoth, or band together with up to three friends for some classic couch co-op action.
  • Utilize unique multiplayer skills such as Rope Drop, Leap Frog, and a heart gifting hug.
  • Travel to and explore the three biomes of Monoth in a seamless adventure.
  • Uncover items from the history of Mickey & Friends by collecting the Mickey Memorabilia items.
  • Collectable cards, known as Tokuns, and glimmering Glimts unlock the history and mystery of Monoth.
  • Over 30 minutes of fully animated cutscens, featuring an authentic voice cast of Disney characters.
  • Fully orchestrated original score by, BAFTA and Ivor Novella-nominated, composer David Housden.

A Beautiful Hand-Drawn World

Mickey and Friends have travelled to the beautiful island of Monoth for a picnic. However, they soon discover not is all as it seems and adventure is afoot.

Monoth is split into three distinct biomes:

Pavonia - Pavonia, the Western Biome, is famous for its incredible flora and fauna. These wondrous crops are harvested for food and supplies, then distributed throughout Monoth. Legend states that Pavonia is fruitful and prosperous due to the protection of "The Highness," a giant peacock believed to wrap the entire biome within its wings. Pavonia is made up of three regions: Forgotten Farmlands, Terrarium Town, and Head of The Highness.

Gizmopolis - Gizmopolis, the Northern Biome of Monoth, is known for its incredible logic-defying mechanisms. Built from what appears to be a collection of discarded parts and pieces, it is a biome that never stands still. Run by "The PostOfficer" to be a productive and automated Biome of Engineering, Gizmopolis is a bustling hub of inaction, due to the level of automation causing an inversion in productivity. Gizmopolis is made up of three regions: Downtown Gizmopolis, MOPS, and Servo's Swing Spot.

Astrono - Situated on the Eastern coast of Monoth is the awe-inspiring biome of Astrono, the Biome of Astronomy. Formed from the small fishing village of Crescent Hamlet, over time the gravity changed, pulling the moons and stars closer together. When the moons collided and cracked, their magical Moon Juice spilled out into the world, forming floating pools of wonder, and creating the galactic ocean known as The Sky Below. Astrono is made up of three regions: Crater's Bay, Crescent Hamlet, and The Sky Below.

supported_languages:
English*, French*, Italian*, German*, Japanese*, Korean*, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America*, Traditional Chinese*
*languages with full audio support
